items.final_wording: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21
source.population: People receiving laboratory monitoring for listed chronic conditions, including hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hyperlipidaemia.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for listed chronic-condition laboratory monitoring in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad follow-up and arbitrary laboratory-result workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-led laboratory monitoring and medicine-change context for chronic-condition virtual review.

items.final_wording: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21
source.population: People receiving laboratory monitoring for listed chronic conditions, including hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hyperlipidaemia.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for listed chronic-condition laboratory monitoring in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad follow-up and arbitrary laboratory-result workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

items.rationale: Supports documenting reviewed laboratory results and comparison with previous monitoring results without interpreting them.
